strategy: Diff-driven surgical refresh: the diff 4126a49..HEAD (the previous scan ref) was the staleness map. Every doc claim touching a file changed in that range was re-verified against current source; every count was re-derived via shell; claims citing unchanged files retained valid line numbers. Accurate content was preserved (not regenerated blank-slate).

completed_steps.summary: Archived the completed 2026-04-29 exhaustive-rescan state before starting a fresh exhaustive full_rescan.
Confirmed classification unchanged: single-part web monolith, React SPA + Supabase BaaS, TypeScript strict. project_type_id=web.

Re-derived installed stack from package-lock.json: React 18.3.1, TS 5.9.3, Vite 6.4.2, Tailwind 4.2.4, supabase-js 2.104.1, TanStack Query 5.100.1, Vitest 4.1.5, Playwright 1.59.1. NEW: Node engine >=25 (@types/node 25.6.0), tdd-guard-vitest removed, supabase CLI now brew-global (no npm dep).

Verified drift across changed files (4126a49..HEAD): context useX hooks split into sibling files (4 new), DevtoolsGate extracted to src/components/DevtoolsGate.tsx (DCE pattern intact), AppContext 797->710 LOC, AuthContext stale-JWT now Promise.race (5s timeout fires), 2 new migrations (012 insubordination + timestamped harden_database_linter_findings adding a private schema), DashboardView undoable-action derivation reworked.

Updated source tree + counts (113 src files / 103 non-test, 47 components, 13 migrations, 8 context files), added DevtoolsGate, context hook siblings, new migrations, brew-CLI scripts/lib helpers, and corrected the tests/support listing.

Updated Supabase CLI prerequisite (brew global; CI pins 2.95.0 via setup-cli), removed stale tdd-guard-vitest note, fixed npx-supabase reference and added startSupabaseWithRecovery. CI test.yml/deploy.yml descriptions re-verified accurate.
Updated HEAD/branch (cad3cfa on main), redesign-merged framing, AuthContext Promise.race (2 sites), and the AppContext silent-filter wrapper line refs (329-351 / 375-395).

project-overview: Node>=25 row, brew Supabase CLI, current-HEAD section, redesign-landed framing. data-models: 13 migrations + naming note, Insubordination default (DB=15; AppContext DEFAULT_BEHAVIORS=14 drift), private-schema/search_path hardening, hardened RPC grants. state-management: context Provider/hook split, AppContext 710 LOC, silent-filter refs, undoable derivation, AuthContext Promise.race, SoundContext PGRST116 :120. component-inventory: count 47, DevtoolsGate, UndoToast prop-not-poll.
Updated master index last-generated date + HEAD anchor. Version table re-verified accurate; all 8 generated docs present (zero incomplete markers).

Validated: prettier --check clean (after --write normalized the data-models table), state-file JSON valid, zero incomplete markers under docs (excl .archive), git diff --check clean, 50/50 relative markdown links resolve.
Workflow complete; surgical exhaustive full_rescan finalized.

key_drift_since_prior_scan: Branch merged: redesign/editorial-engineering -> main via PR #86 (6b06828).
Context useX hooks split into sibling files (useApp/useAuth/useSoundContext/useTheme) for react-refresh/only-export-components; contexts 4 -> 8 files.
DevtoolsGate extracted from main.tsx into src/components/DevtoolsGate.tsx (DCE pattern unchanged).
AuthContext stale-JWT: unwired AbortController replaced with Promise.race (5s timeout now fires).

Two new migrations: 012_add_insubordination_behavior.sql and timestamp-prefixed 20260429181608_harden_database_linter_findings.sql (private schema, search_path hardening, dropped pg_graphql, tightened grants).
Default-behavior drift: DB ships 15 (incl. Insubordination); AppContext.DEFAULT_BEHAVIORS still 14, so resetBehaviorsToDefault omits it.
Toolchain: Node >=25 sync; tdd-guard-vitest removed; Supabase CLI switched to brew global with startSupabaseWithRecovery.
